properties.name: orion.audit.enabled
properties.description: Master switch for orion-audit.

properties.name: orion.audit.database-enabled
properties.description: Backward-compatible toggle for the built-in database driver.

properties.name: orion.audit.listener-mode
properties.description: Listener mode: AUTO, HIBERNATE, or JPA.

properties.name: orion.audit.drivers
properties.description: Explicit built-in drivers to enable.

properties.name: orion.audit.actions
properties.description: Globally enabled audit actions.

properties.name: orion.audit.table-name
properties.description: Audit table name.

properties.name: orion.audit.schema
properties.description: Optional schema prefix for the audit table.

properties.name: orion.audit.store-full-snapshot
properties.description: Store full before and after snapshots instead of changed-only maps.

properties.name: orion.audit.store-empty-changes
properties.description: Persist update events even when no effective field changes are detected.

properties.name: orion.audit.fail-on-error
properties.description: Propagate audit write failures instead of logging them.

properties.name: orion.audit.ignored-fields
properties.description: Global field names to exclude from auditing.

properties.name: orion.audit.use-spring-security
properties.description: Use Spring Security to resolve actor information when available.

properties.name: orion.audit.capture-request-info
properties.description: Capture servlet request metadata when available.

properties.name: orion.audit.default-source
properties.description: Fallback audit source label.

properties.name: orion.audit.prefer-json-column
properties.description: Prefer JSON-capable database column types when supported.

properties.name: orion.audit.initialize-schema
properties.description: Create the audit table automatically on startup if it does not already exist.

properties.name: orion.audit.ddl-auto
properties.description: Optional Hibernate DDL override.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors
properties.description: Optional polymorphic actor mappings used by the Spring Security actor resolver.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors[].type
properties.description: Stored actor type, for example users or customers.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors[].principal-class
properties.description: Fully qualified authenticated principal class name to match.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors[].id-property
properties.description: Bean property path to read the actor id from the authenticated principal.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors[].name-property
properties.description: Bean property path to read the actor name from the authenticated principal.

properties.name: orion.audit.actors[].tenant-id-property
properties.description: Optional bean property path to read tenant id from the authenticated principal.

properties.name: orion.audit.flyway.enabled
properties.description: Enable audit Flyway migration contribution.

properties.name: orion.audit.flyway.vendor
properties.description: Database vendor override for audit migrations.

properties.name: orion.audit.flyway.locations
properties.description: Additional audit migration locations to add after the vendor-specific location.

properties.name: orion.audit.flyway.append-to-existing
properties.description: Append audit Flyway locations to the application's existing Flyway locations.
